name: ship-check-hygiene
default_program:
[stages: preflight>detect>analyze>review>handoff>audit |
 scope: diff|repo |
 policy: evidence,safety-gates,quality-gates{docs,release,surface-sync},deterministic-output |
 lens: release-gatekeeper |
 output: md(contract=v1)]

required_inputs.name: REQUIRED_DOCS
required_inputs.description: Docs that must be updated or present before release and are expected to remain public after the release.

required_inputs.name: SURFACE_CONTRACTS
required_inputs.description: Public-surface contracts such as skill-metadata/docs parity or required path ownership.

required_inputs.name: LEGACY_PATTERNS
required_inputs.description: Names, files, or patterns that must not survive the release, including delivery-only implementation docs.
